title: Policy: Modify Policy Settings
scenario: Verify that policy changes applied via Lens Cloud are reflected as locked and greyed-out settings on the device, with a dialog preventing edits.
steps: Apply a policy to a device via Lens Cloud.
Change a policy setting in Lens Cloud.
Check the device settings page in the app to see if the updated values are reflected.
Verify that the settings are locked and greyed out.
Observe if a dialog appears indicating the settings cannot be edited.
expected: The updated policy values are reflected on the device settings page in the app, locked and greyed out. Attempting to modify those settings shows a dialog indicating they cannot be edited.
